title: Ditomaxs Backpack
description: This mod adds a fully functional backpack using the Accessories API
body:
# Description
This mod allow you to use and wear animated backpack items in [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net/), the mod require [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and the [Accessories API](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) to work

# Supported Minecraft Versions
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.1 (Discontinued)

# Modpacks
You are free to use this mod in any of your modpacks

# About
Ditomaxs backpack mod adds a fully functional backpack wich can be used while holding it in hand, or equipt on the backpack slot and opened using the keybind. The backpack is also rendered on the players back and interactable for other players. It also has some small animations while ideling, walking, running and jumping.
